name: Hong Gil-dong
headline: Applied AI Engineer
summary: Applied AI engineer working across LLM product integration, evaluation, serving, and production data flows. I am strongest when early-stage model capabilities need to become measurable product behavior with clear quality bars, operational safeguards, and feedback loops for iteration.

bullets: Built LLM-backed product features with retrieval, prompt iteration, and evaluation loops that could run inside real service workflows.
Implemented model serving APIs and experiment scaffolding for prompt and model version comparisons so teams could assess behavior changes quickly.
Worked with product teams to turn ambiguous AI requests into measurable service behavior, failure criteria, and rollout expectations.
Operated inference services and offline evaluation jobs for ranking and recommendation systems in production.
Improved experiment reproducibility with dataset version tracking and baseline comparison workflows.

projects.name: LLM Support Assistant
projects.subtitle: RAG and evaluation workflow
bullets: Built a retrieval-augmented support assistant with citation checks and failure-case review workflows.
Defined offline evaluation slices and regression checks for prompt and model updates before release.
